Title: Body Content Component
URL: https://swatkb.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DRUP/pages/175931407
Version: 3
---

The
Body Content
component allows the user to place formatted text in any page region, which is normally only reserved for the page’s
Body
field or a more complex component.
Elements
Body (
required
)
Examples

Step-by-step Instructions
Provide the
Body Content
that will be presented as formatted
text on the page.
